title: Not Too Much Dungens
description: The whole modpack is mainly about dungons. It's about taking Vanila Minecraft to the next level of hardcore.
body:
# NTMD (Not too much dungens).

Your adventure starts in a normal Minecraft world with only three hearts and too many restrictions to play normally. in order not to die you have to start small to earn XP and level up and get better.

The whole modpack is mainly about dungons. It's about taking Vanila Minecraft to the next level of hardcore.

## It's not just about hardcore and Dungons.

In the modpack you will also find some Building Focust mods like [Creat](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [Macaw's Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture) or even [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).

### For the server 
there are [Simpel Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap).

#### License problems
Permissions:
- [Mythic Mounts](https://discord.com/channels/866350560416497695/866350560860176447/1093685532493619321)
- [Ecologics](https://discord.com/channels/843931684406952018/933929427757314109/1092817437348610112)
